CONTENT.Career: Born in Volnovakha Raion, Donetsk Oblast, Topalov trained in the Shakhtar Donetsk youth academy beginning at age 8.He made his debut for FC Mariupol in the Ukrainian Premier League as a second-half substitute against FC Kolos Kovalivka on 30 July 2019.
CONTENT.External links: Dmytro Topalov at SoccerwayDmytro Topalov at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)Dmytro Topalov at FootballFacts.ru  (in Russian)

SUMMARY: Dmytro Eduardovych Topalov (Ukrainian: Дмитро Едуардович Топалов; born 12 March 1998) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Kolos Kovalivka on loan from Shakhtar Donetsk in the Ukrainian Premier League.
